roa.docketEntryComment: CONFIDENTIAL Petition for Revocation of PRCS PC 3455, PC 1203.2
Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring After Release and Report
Order - Order Terminating Post Release Community Supervision (PRCS)
Order - Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring Terminated
Order - Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring Modified

/CAL: MODIFY CURFEW & TO SET APD 3455PC/EMMOD: AS TO DATE OF 06-18-22 ONLY, DEFENDANT MAY TRAVEL TO SACRAMENTO ON AN EXTENDED CURFEW FROM THE HOURS OF 6AM - 9PM/CTORD: ALL CONDITIONS OF RELEASE REMAIN THE SAME/CONTD: TO SET APD 3455PC/DOP/

/CAL: RELEASE CONDITIONS/DAWT/ACM/WS/WEAP/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING (HOME DETENTION) BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH  GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TOCOMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSOCOMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO HAVE A CURFEW & REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN IN THE  INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE DURING THE FOLLOWING HOURS: 6PM - 5AM/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO ATTEND COUNSELING/GROUPS AS DIRECTED: TRP CLASSES, THINKING FOR A CHANGE/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X: 05-23-22 IS CONFIRMED/

/CAL:APD PETITION TO REVOKE POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION PURSUANT TOPC 3455/DAWT/CON:DAVID HARRISON/CTORD: PRCS IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/SHER/NB/S9/TBH: 22004530, 21009814, 21009147 & 19016572/CONTD:TO SET APD 3455PC/
/CAL: TS APD 3455PC/EMMOD: FROM 6AM-6PM DEFENDANT MAY TO TRAVEL TO STOCKTON ON 06-10-22/CONTD: MODIFACTION OF CURFEW/DAWF/
